extDescription.message: A browser extension that compares different CSS.

info.message: Select two elements in the Elements tab of the DevTools panel and the style differences will be shown below.

selectedInfo.message: Please select two elements to compare.

tableColumnInfo.message: The header name is concatenated from the DOM's `TagName`, `Id`, and `Class` attributes using `$$$$`.
